title: Fix meme-mode persona filtering in congress_identities

log.context: Fix meme-mode persona filtering in congress_identities

All done. Here's a summary of the fix:

**Bug:** `congress_identities` in `/mnt/data/temporal-workflows/activities/congress_act.py` had a hardcoded `ALLOWED_STATUSES = {"eligible", "moderator"}` that dropped `status: meme` personas before they ever reached the workflow. The workflow's meme-mode filter at line 180 (`eligible_statuses = ("eligible", "meme") if is_meme else ("eligible",)`) was therefore operating on an empty set of meme personas.
